subcodes.first_line: O dear friends of ʻAbdu’l-Baha! Since on the path of Baha ye have tasted the poison of oppression and been made the target of the dart of calamity
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز عبدالبهاء زیرا در سبیل بهاء زهر جفا چشیدید و هدف تیر بلا شدید
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Abraham; Isaac; Ishmael
